PageDate — Chrome Web Store upload checklist
==========================================

ZIP to upload
  dist/page-date-extension-v1.2.1.zip

Rebuild later
  ./scripts/package-extension.sh

Dashboard fields (Chrome Web Store → your item)
  Homepage URL:     https://13069.github.io/page-date/
  Privacy policy:   https://13069.github.io/page-date/privacy.html
  Category:         Productivity (or Developer Tools)
  Language:         English

Single purpose
  Detect and display publish/creation dates on web pages and page elements.

Permission justifications (copy into the form)
  storage     — Save user settings and API key in Chrome sync storage
  activeTab     — Access the current tab when the user opens the popup or scans
  <all_urls>    — Read page content on sites the user visits to detect dates
  archive.org   — Check Internet Archive Wayback availability for the page
  page-date.onrender.com — Send page snapshots to the PageDate API when the user provides an API key

Data use / privacy (declare in the form)
  - Extension reads page HTML/DOM on pages the user visits
  - With a user-provided API key, page snapshots are sent to page-date.onrender.com for analysis
  - API key and preferences stored in Chrome sync storage only
  - No data sold to third parties

Store listing assets you still need (not in the zip)
  - 128×128 icon (use icons/icon128.png)
  - At least 1 screenshot (1280×800 or 640×400 recommended)
  - Optional: small promo tile 440×280

After approval
  Users request a key at https://13069.github.io/page-date/#register
  You email them a key; they paste it in the extension popup.
